execute.stdout: red red green green blue blue

code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut start = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut first = true
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9
        if start < i
          let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
          if first
            result = "#{tok} #{tok}"
            first = false
          else
            result = "#{result} #{tok} #{tok}"
          end
        end
        start = i + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start < n
    let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
    if first
      result = "#{tok} #{tok}"
    else
      result = "#{result} #{tok} #{tok}"
    end
  end
  println(result)
when None
  ()
end
